name: bean
description: Local hybrid search over your knowledge base — 10 built-in connectors (Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Confluence, Jira, Zendesk, Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft 365, Discord) plus local files (incl. PDF), and a plugin system for authoring your own. /bean <question>, /bean sync, /bean init. No server: your credentials, Lance + DuckDB under ~/.bean.
